zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian FitzWalter於大約1275年出生在英國艾可亨哈姆時，她的父親Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter29歲，母親Devorguilla de Burgh21歲。她和William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1315年12月6日之前在威爾士福林爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian FitzWalter于大约1275年出生在英国艾可亨哈姆时，她的父亲Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter29岁，母亲Devorguilla de Burgh21岁。她和William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1315年12月6日之前在威尔士福林爾。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWalter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , ‘son of Walter’.

variants.name: Fitzwater
meanings: Irish: altered form of Fitzwalter, a patronymic from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , meaning ‘son of Walter’.

History: This is the name of a family of Norman origin, descended from Godfrey, Count of Brionne (died c. 1010). Godfrey's grandson, Richard FitzGilbert, accompanied William the Conqueror and was made Lord of Clare. His great-grandson was Robert FitzWalter, one of the barons who guaranteed the Magna Carta in 1215.

variants.name: Walter
meanings: English (of Norman origin), German, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This personal name was introduced into England both in the reign of Edward the Confessor and by the Normans (in the forms Walt(i)er, Waut(i)er). After the Norman Conquest it soon became one of the most popular personal names in Britain. Compare Walther .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Valter and Czech Valtr: from the personal name Valter, Valtr, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian FitzWalter was born about 1275, in Henham, Essex, England, her father, Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter, was 29 and her mother, Devorguilla de Burgh, was 21. She had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal. She died before 6 December 1315, in Flintshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian FitzWalter est née environ 1275, à Henham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Devorguilla de Burgh, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal. Elle est décédée avant 6 décembre 1315, à Flintshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian FitzWalter um 1275 in Henham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter 29 und ihre Mutter Devorguilla de Burgh 21. Sie hatte mit William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb vor 6. Dezember 1315 in Flintshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian FitzWalter è nata il circa 1275 nel Henham, Essex, England, sua padre, Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Devorguilla de Burgh, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal. Morì prima del 6 dicembre 1315, nel Flintshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian FitzWalterが約1275年にイギリスエセックスヘンハムで生まれた時，父Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalterは29歳，母Devorguilla de Burghは21歳であった。彼女はWilliam Marshal 1st Lord Marshalとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1315年12月6日以前にウェールズフリントシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian FitzWalter(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 에세스 헨함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Devorguilla de Burgh(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1315년 12월 6일 이전 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian FitzWalter nasceu aproximadamente 1275, em Henham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Devorguilla de Burgh, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal. Ela faleceu antes 6 de dezembro de 1315, em Flintshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian FitzWalter родилась около 1275 г. в местности хенам, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Devorguilla de Burgh, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от William Marshal 1st Lord Marshal. Она умерла перед 6 декабрь 1315 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс.
